caption: The video captures a scene from a soccer training session on a well-maintained field, likely part of a professional team's practice. Two players in blue jerseys with "Real Madrid" written on the back are seen running towards the center of the field, their movements suggesting they are warming up or preparing for a drill. In the background, other players in black jerseys and yellow socks are also engaged in various activities, possibly practicing passing or positioning. The stadium seats are empty, indicating that this is a closed training session. The atmosphere appears focused and disciplined, typical of a high-level sports team's preparation routine.
